When the Sun enters Sign Aries one should observe the por-
tents mentioned above, as well as on the Full-Moon and New Moon
days, and collect or buy summer corn. He would earn much profit
by selling the corn in the fourth month. In the case of forest roots
and fruits the observation should be made when the Sun enters
Sign Taurus.
^ t
***% ii^M
If one collects all kinds of juice (or juicy things or the six
varieties of taste) and corn when the Sun is in Sign Gemini, after
observing the portents, and sells them in the sixth month, he will
make large profits.
^ m\\
Similarly one should store up honey, perfumes, oils, ghee and
treacle, when the Sun is in Cancer, and sell them in the second
month. He will then make cent per cent profit. He will sustain loss
